title: Walmart Exclusive Zamac Editions
summary: It is noted in this year, instead of the usual 3 ZAMAC releases per set, only 2 ZAMACs are released per set. Because less ZAMACs came out per lot, only 12 cars came out instead of the usual 18 cars for 2023....

title: Team Hot Wheels Top Rides Series (2012)
summary: The Team Hot Wheels Top Rides Series was released exclusively at Target stores in 2012. All castings in this series are all 2011 and 2012 mainline releases on a specially designed card by the picks of the four driver teams. Each vehicle comes with a sticker sheet consisting of the Team Hot Wheels logo and the team color icon.

title: Derek Gable
summary: Created page with " Derek John Gable was an English designer and engineer at Mattel from 1968 until 1984 who held many positions including Preliminary Design Team Manager. He is known for his work on Sizzlers, Hot Shots, Hi-Rakers, and many other series. Gable signed many of his patents "Gay" instead of his full last name and left the company due to an intern..."
